title: Sweet Tender Jamaican Pear Bake
description: A funky and tender Jamaican dish featuring Korean pear that's perfect for a date-night dinner. The al-dente finish and anti-inflammatory-friendly ingredients make it a great option for a special occasion.
instructions: Peel, core, and chop the Korean pear into 1-inch pieces.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the coconut oil, brown sugar, allspice, cinnamon, ginger, and salt.
Add the chopped pear to the dry mixture and toss until evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish and bake for 35 minutes.
Stir in the coconut milk, Greek yogurt, honey, and vanilla extract.
Continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the pear is tender and the top is lightly golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
Serve warm, topped with additional coconut flakes or a dollop of whipped cream if desired.
Garnish with fresh herbs like mint or basil for added flavor and visual appeal.
